evidence: Apple announced Feb 2 2015 conversion of GT Advanced Technologies plant to data center; operational control Oct 2015; op ~2016-2017. DCname 'Mesa' with 2016 op year matches Apple timeline; no other operator fits.
Meta announced Mesa campus Aug 2021 (greenfield 5-building); May 2022 announced 3 additional buildings. Mesa 1/2/3 are part of that campus. First public signal: Aug 2021.
Same Meta Mesa campus; additional 3 buildings announced May 2022 expansion, but original campus announcement was Aug 2021. Assigning 2021 as first public signal for the campus.

Mesa 3 is one of 3 additional buildings announced in May 2022 expansion beyond the initial 5-building Aug 2021 announcement. Using 2022 as the specific announcement for buildings beyond original campus.
CryptoWatt (later Atlas Power) bought Butte MSE facility in Jan 2018; operation fired up 2018; Ponzi scandal caused shutdown; Atlas Power relaunched ~2020. First public announcement ~early 2018.

Meta (Facebook) announced Papillion Data Center April 4 2017 at Papillion City Hall; broke ground 2017; went live 2019. S&P op year 2018 = construction/first-phase energization. Announcement was Apr 2017.
Facebook announced Springfield expansion across Capehart Road March 2021; first buildings in Springfield (renamed Sarpy Data Center) completed 2021.
Meta announced 9-building campus expansion (including buildings in Springfield) July 28 2022; completion targeted end of 2024.
Meta announced 9-building campus expansion July 28 2022 — same announcement wave as Sarpy 7.
Facebook announced $800M expansion to 8 buildings (adding buildings 7 and 8) in March 2022; construction started spring 2022; both came online 2024.
Same March 2022 announcement as Los Lunas 7 — buildings 7 and 8 announced together as $800M expansion.
Lancium broke ground on Fort Stockton Clean Campus September 15 2021 — groundbreaking IS the first announcement; 325 MW crypto/HPC campus.
Applied Blockchain (now Applied Digital) signed LOI for Garden City TX 200 MW data center November 24 2021; energized October 2023. The S&P 100 MW row is the first phase.
